entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp., the primary crop studied

entities.name: INDETERMINATE GROWTH
entities.description: Growth habit where flowering begins at basal nodes and proceeds acropetally

entities.name: DETERMINATE GROWTH
entities.description: Growth habit where flowering begins on apical racemes and proceeds basipetally

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The process of flower development on branches and racemes

entities.name: NORMAL CONDITIONS
entities.description: Standard environmental conditions affecting pod set

entities.name: POD SETTING
entities.description: The process of pods forming from flowers, with more pods set from earlier flowers

entities.name: POD WEIGHT
entities.description: The average weight of pods, found to be similar for earlier and later-formed pods in pigeonpea

entities.name: SEEDS PER POD
entities.description: The number of seeds per pod, found to be similar regardless of pod formation time

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight per seed, found to be similar regardless of pod formation time

entities.name: NITROGEN CONTENT
entities.description: The nitrogen content of seeds, found to be similar regardless of pod formation time

entities.name: HERBACEOUS LEGUMES
entities.description: Legumes where later-formed pods are typically smaller than earlier-formed pods

entities.name: PERENNIAL NATURE
entities.description: The intrinsic perennial growth characteristic of pigeonpeas

entities.name: ANNUAL NATURE
entities.description: The annual growth characteristic identified in certain cultivars or breeders' lines

entities.name: SCREENING PROCEDURE
entities.description: A method using the comparison of earlier- and later-formed pod weights to identify annual nature
